prompt:
A compact observation card showing repeated notes and tiny paired-star sketches used to verify a binary split across multiple attempts. An eyepiece and focusing tool nearby make it clearly a telescope verification artifact about magnification, focus, and color contrast.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft warm field lighting, realistic paper and pencil texture, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the card centered and uncluttered.
